hooks.command: COMMAND=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""') && if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git push'; then if ! npm test > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Coverage gate: test coverage is below 80%. Push blocked."}}'; fi; fi
